name: Lemon Blueberry Bars
servings: serves 16 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 25 minutes
method: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Line an 8x8-inch baking dish with parchment paper.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, salt, baking powder, lemon zest, lemon juice, eggs, sugar, applesauce, and milk.
Transfer the batter into the prepared baking dish. Bake for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes clean.
Cut into bars and serve with a dusting of powdered sugar.
